texto: The moment a question comes to your mind see yourself mentally taking hold of it and disposing of it. In that moment... you learn to become the decider and not the vacillator. Thus you build character.
explicacao: Citação de H. Van Anderson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The moment a question comes to your mind see yourself mentally taking hold of it and disposing of…” articula reflexao, decisions, moment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
